name: vix
description: Make, edit, and compose media with VIX — images, video, and audio through composable operations your agent chains toward the outcome you describe.

interface.shortDescription: Make, edit, and compose media — images, video, and audio.
interface.longDescription: VIX is a media automation studio for agents: generate, edit, transform, compose, and render images, video, and audio through operations that chain into one result. Your agent searches the catalog, plans for free, runs async, and passes each output into the next step — guided by built-in method lessons.
defaultPrompt: Generate a product photo on a clean white background, then turn it into a 5-second reveal video.
